title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop app that extends Claude from a chatbot into a full productivity system. It enables local file access, persistent memory, connectors, skills, projects, browser extension, and scheduled tasks for automating workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
